# Joaquin Oroño Bugnon — Freelance AI & Data Architect

> Freelance, independent AI & Data Architect based in Barcelona, Spain, with 15+ years
> bridging business needs and end-to-end data platform delivery for large corporations and
> digital businesses. Available as a project partner to bring practical, monetizable AI into
> organizations — remote, short trips accepted.

## Who

- **Name:** Joaquin Oroño Bugnon
- **Title:** Freelance AI & Data Architect (also: AI / Data Architect, Data Architect, AI Architect)
- **Availability:** Freelance / independent — open to project-based engagements as your data & AI partner. Remote, short trips accepted.
- **Location:** Barcelona, Spain
- **Email:** joaquin.orono@gmail.com
- **Phone / WhatsApp:** +34 677 05 17 33
- **Languages:** English, Spanish

## What I do

I help organizations turn AI and data into real, monetizable value. As a freelance partner I lead
end-to-end data architecture and AI adoption: from strategy and scalable, AI-ready data platforms
(serverless, cloud-native) to data governance, democratization, MLOps and the practical deployment
of LLMs inside the business. I lead multiple parallel projects and multinational, multidisciplinary
teams toward a common goal.

Why hire me for your project: 15+ years of delivery across travel, banking, retail, hospitality,
industry and government; equally comfortable with deep technical architecture and the strategic,
business-value view that makes leadership see the return.

## Tech

- **Cloud & infrastructure:** Google Cloud, Microsoft Azure, Terraform, GitHub
- **Data platforms & warehousing:** BigQuery, Snowflake, Databricks, PostgreSQL, Cloudera, Oracle, Impala, SAP BW/HANA
- **Ingestion / transformation / orchestration:** dbt, Fivetran, Airbyte, Talend Stitch, Airflow / Composer, Dataform, Jedox
- **Streaming & big data:** Confluent Kafka, Apache Flink, Pub/Sub, Hadoop, Hortonworks, HBase / Phoenix
- **AI / ML / LLM:** Anthropic Claude, Model Context Protocol (MCP), MLOps, Python, Machine Learning
- **BI & governance:** Power BI, Qlik, Tableau, Looker, Collibra

## Selected results

- **Hoteles Silken** (hospitality, 2024/2025) — AI data stack from scratch on GCP; Claude + MCP over BigQuery for real-time pricing auto-applied to the channel manager; MLOps for demand forecasting.
- **Grupo Cursach** (leisure, 2025) — Financial data lake on GCP with a Claude + MCP agent for conversational treasury analysis; Excel reports generated automatically.
- **Schneider Electric** (finance, France, 2022/2023) — Collibra governance across ~60 systems (17 SAP ERP + Central Finance); unified, automated P&L adopted org-wide.
- **Banque Misr Digital** (banking, 2021) — Real-time banking platform on Cloudera with Kafka + Flink, Impala DWH and HBase/Phoenix over 25 unified sources.
- **Japan Tobacco International** (FMCG, 2013/2015) — Global BI rollout to 6,500+ users across 3 continents.

## Experience

- **Interim Head of Data — Meeting Doctors** (Dec 2025 – present) — leading the data area and modernizing the stack to enable AI monetization.
- **Founder & Product Manager — Mind One & Qontexta.ai** (2025 – present) — end-to-end leadership of two AI & data products.
- **Founder & Senior Data Engineer / Architect — Mind** (2013 – present) — practical knowledge lab; 12+ years of end-to-end data transformations and AI adoption.
- **Data & Analytics Engineer / Architect — SDG Consulting** (2011 – 2012).
- **Senior Data / BI Consultant — Oracle Corp. Spain** (2005 – 2010).

## Education & certifications

- Engineer in Computer Science (Business Management) — Universidad de Castilla-La Mancha (2001–2005)
- Project Management Professional (PMP) — PMI (2014)
- Professional Scrum Master — Scrum.org (2020)
- Cloud Digital Leader — Google (2021)

independent project partner. The best way to reach me is email (joaquin.orono@gmail.com) or
WhatsApp (+34 677 05 17 33).
